title: CCL - Selecting No Noise Block
scenario: "No Noise Block" option can be selected in Device Settings > Advanced on a CCL-supported device
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap on 'No Noise Block' to select it.
expected: The 'No Noise Block' option is successfully selected and applied on a device that supports CCL.
